task: Negotiate a purchase agreement for Spanish Colonial in Santa Barbara CA (Real Estate). The only negotiated term is unit_price_usd. Catalog retail is $3850000.00 and wholesale is $3080000.00. Product features: 4-bedroom Spanish-style home with tile roof and courtyard. Reference: https://www.villagerealestate.com/

agent_a.system_goal: You are the supplier for Spanish Colonial in Santa Barbara CA. Maximize unit_price_usd while preserving margin over wholesale cost and closing a deal quickly.

agent_b.system_goal: You are buying Spanish Colonial in Santa Barbara CA. Minimize unit_price_usd while staying within budget and trying to close at a realistic market price.
